Off Calendar Dec-02-2015 Continued To Feb-17-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Osc Regarding Preliminary Injunction And Request For Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar Nov-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Ryan F. Thomas, Esq., (707)545-6542 of Johnston Thomas for Plaintiff/Opposing party Beverly J. Joinder.
Robert B. Norum, Esq., (562)983-7592 of Buckley Madole, P.C. for Defendants/Moving parties Specialized Loan Servicing LLC and HSBC Bank USA, NA as Trustee.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Osc Regarding Preliminary Injunction And Request For Temporary Restraining Order is DENIED. Plaintiffs fail to sustain their burden. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ryan F. Thomas, Esq., (707)545-6542 of Johnston Thomas for Plaintiff/Opposing party Beverly J. Joinder.
Robert B. Norum, Esq., (562)983-7592 of Buckley Madole, P.C. for Defendants/Moving parties Specialized Loan Servicing LLC and HSBC Bank USA, NA as Trustee.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard no oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING LLC, A COLORADO LIMITED, HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiffs to allege/identify the terms of the contract(s) breached and to allege each element of statutory violations causes of action. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
